---
title: "References"
---

## Software & Tools

Seurat [@hao2021integrated] ([GitHub](https://github.com/satijalab/seurat))

ArchR [@granja2021archr] ([GitHub](https://github.com/GreenleafLab/ArchR) \| [Docs](https://www.archrproject.com))

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {#refs}
:::
